# GitFoundry

> GitFoundry is a UK web design studio that builds precision hand-coded static websites for small businesses, sole traders, freelancers, and charities. Websites are hosted free on GitHub Pages. Clients pay once and own the source code outright — no monthly fees, no platform lock-in, ever.

GitFoundry is based in Stoke-on-Trent, Staffordshire, and works with clients across the United Kingdom. Every site is written from scratch in plain HTML, CSS, and JavaScript — no WordPress, no Squarespace, no page builders. Sites are optimised to score 90+ on Google Lighthouse.

## Services

- **Foundry** (£149) — A focused, single-purpose website. Ideal for sole traders who need a clean online presence quickly. Live in as few as 3 working days.
- **Precision** (£399) — A multi-page website with up to 5 pages, a contact form, and a journal section. Typical delivery: 7 working days.
- **Bespoke** (£749+) — A fully custom build with no scope constraints. Pricing and timeline agreed at brief stage.

All prices include UK VAT. One-time payment. No monthly fees. No recurring charges.

## Key differentiators

- **Hand-coded** — every site built from scratch, no templates or CMS
- **No monthly fees** — GitHub Pages hosting is free, permanent, and provided by Microsoft
- **Source code ownership** — full repository transferred to client on delivery
- **UK-based** — Stoke-on-Trent, Staffordshire; works with clients nationwide
- **Fast** — Foundry sites live in 3 days; Precision in 7 working days
- **Performance** — 90+ Lighthouse scores as standard

## Sectors served

GitFoundry has published case studies on building websites for the following professions:

- [Tradesperson / self-employed builder](https://gitfoundry.co.uk/journal/journal-003-the-tradesperson.html)
- [Solicitor / legal professional](https://gitfoundry.co.uk/journal/journal-004-the-solicitor.html)
- [Physiotherapist / sports therapist](https://gitfoundry.co.uk/journal/journal-005-the-physiotherapist.html)
- [Photographer](https://gitfoundry.co.uk/journal/journal-006-the-photographer.html)
- [Private tutor](https://gitfoundry.co.uk/journal/journal-007-the-tutor.html)
- [Accountant / bookkeeper](https://gitfoundry.co.uk/journal/journal-008-the-accountant.html)
- [Personal trainer / fitness coach](https://gitfoundry.co.uk/journal/journal-009-the-personal-trainer.html)
- [Counsellor / therapist](https://gitfoundry.co.uk/journal/journal-010-the-counsellor.html)
- [Florist](https://gitfoundry.co.uk/journal/journal-011-the-florist.html)
- [Architect](https://gitfoundry.co.uk/journal/journal-012-the-architect.html)
- [Driving instructor](https://gitfoundry.co.uk/journal/journal-013-the-driving-instructor.html)

## Get started

Submit a project brief at [gitfoundry.co.uk/brief.html](https://gitfoundry.co.uk/brief.html). GitFoundry responds within 48 hours with a fixed quote and timeline.

## Contact

- Email: info@gitfoundry.co.uk
- Web: https://gitfoundry.co.uk
- Location: Stoke-on-Trent, Staffordshire, United Kingdom
